hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep '\.py$' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'ruff format "{}" 2>/dev/null; ruff check --fix "{}" 2>/dev/null' || true

echo '<shoal-context>This is the shoal project (Python 3.12+, async-first). Run `just ci` for full verification. See CLAUDE.md for conventions. mypy --strict is enforced. Conventional commits required.</shoal-context>'
